originalTitle: Bruno Mars - Risk It All [Live From The Romantic Tour]
content: Bruno Mars - Risk It All [Live From The Romantic Tour] The Romantic – the new album from Bruno Mars, available now. Listen now: https://brunomars.lnk.to/TheRomantic Lyrics: For just a chance to win your heart you could set the bar beyond the stars I’ll do anything anything you ask me to Say you want the moon watch me learn to fly Ain't a mountain you could point to i wouldn’t climb It's crazy but it’s true. There’s nothing I won't do. I’d risk it all for you To hold your hand and call you mine I’m trynna be your man til the end of time oh i’ll do anything, anything you ask me to I would run through the fire just to be by your side if your heart’s on the line you could take mine It's crazy but it’s true. There's nothing I won’t do. I'd risk it all for you I would swim across the sea just to show you sacrifice my life just to hold you I could go on and on to prove that you belong here in my arms Say you want the moon watch me, learn to fly ain’t a mountain you could point to I wouldn’t climb It's crazy but it’s true. There's nothing I won’t do I’d risk it all for you (2x) Join Bruno’s mailing list: https://drop.cobrand.com/d/BrunoMars/Subscribe Shop Bruno’s official store: https://brunomars.lnk.to/officialstore Connect with Bruno: https://www.tiktok.com/@brunomars https://www.instagram.com/brunomars https://www.youtube.com/brunomars https://x.com/brunomars https://www.facebook.com/brunomars https://brunomars.com Bruno Mars is a 16x GRAMMY®-winning global superstar, singer, songwriter, multi-instrumentalist, producer, and one of the most-streamed artists in the world. Known for his showmanship and chart-toppers, Bruno has set a number of records throughout his career, including becoming the first artist ever to hit 150 million monthly listeners on Spotify, appearing on two of the fastest songs to reach one billion streams (for “Die with a Smile” with Lady Gaga and “APT.” with ROSÉ, and achieving the highest-certified song in RIAA history with 2010’s “Just the Way You Are”). Since launching a string of hits beginning in 2009, Bruno has sold over 150 million records worldwide, making him one of the best-selling artists of all time. Beyond his work as a soloist, Bruno is a member of the duo Silk Sonic with Anderson .Paak. In addition to his 35 Billboard Hot 100 hits, including nine number one singles, Bruno is the recipient of 16 GRAMMY® Awards (including “Album of the Year” for 24K Magic), 14 American Music Awards, and seven MTV Video Music Awards. His 24K Magic World Tour was among the highest-grossing tours in history, and within the top ten highest-grossing of the 2010s. #BrunoMars #RiskItAll #TheRomanticTour
chineseSummary: 布鲁诺·马尔斯 · 136,349 次观看
chineseContent: Bruno Mars - Risk It All [Live From The Romantic Tour] The Romantic – Bruno Mars 的新专辑，现已上市。现在听：https://brunomars.lnk.to/TheRomantic 歌词：只要有机会赢得你的心，你就可以设定超越星星的标准，我会做任何你要求我做的事情说你想要月亮看着我学会飞翔不是一座你可以指着的山我不会爬这很疯狂，但这是真的。没有什么是我不会做的。我愿意为你冒一切风险握住你的手并称你为我的我会尝试成为你的男人直到时间的尽头哦我会做任何事情，任何你要求我做的事情我会穿过火只是为了在你身边如果你的心在线上你可以接受我的这很疯狂但这是真的。没有什么是我不会做的。我愿意为你冒一切风险我会游过大海只是为了向你展示牺牲我的生命只是为了拥抱你我可以不断地证明你属于我的怀里说你想让月亮看着我，学会飞翔不是一座你可以指着的山我不会爬这很疯狂，但这是真的。没有什么我不会做的，我愿意为你冒一切风险 (2x) 加入 Bruno 的邮件列表：https://drop.cobrand.com/d/BrunoMars/Subscribe 商店 Bruno 的官方商店：https://brunomars.lnk.to/officialstore 与 Bruno 联系：https://www.tiktok.com/@brunomars https://www.instagram.com/brunomars https://www.youtube.com/brunomars https://x.com/brunomars https://www.facebook.com/brunomars https://brunomars.com Bruno Mars 是一位荣获 16 次格莱美® 大奖的全球超级巨星、歌手、词曲作者、多乐器演奏家、制作人，也是世界上观看次数最多的艺术家之一。布鲁诺以其表演技巧和排行榜冠军而闻名，在他的职业生涯中创造了多项记录，包括成为第一位在 Spotify 上每月拥有 1.5 亿听众的艺术家，出现在两首歌曲中
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
